title: How Do Tool-Augmented LLM Agents Perform on Real-World Energy Analytics Tasks?
summary: How Do Tool-Augmented LLM Agents Perform on Real-World Energy Analytics Tasks?
whyItMatters: Agentic benchmarks have emerged across general-purpose and domain-specific settings, including finance, coding, law, and drug discovery, yet energy-domain evaluations remain largely limited to static knowledge recall. This is a critical gap for a sector that requires live data retrieval, specialized regulatory and market knowledge, and multi-step quantitati…
